title: Senator Anna M. Caballero’s 2024 Legislative Package
prompt_preview:
[1 chunks] Task: Extract all distinct claims about AI or emerging technology in this press release. Do NOT assume a fixed number.
Output JSON only matching the provided schema.
Return concise, standalone claim_texts that could be tested against scientific literature. Exclude purely procedural statem

claims.claim_text: The legislative proposals would set the highest global emission standard in the world for hydrogen fuel.
The legislative proposals would greatly expand hydrogen production.
The legislative proposals aim to produce high-wage jobs.
The California Air Resources Board (CARB) will conduct a study to determine how vehicle miles traveled is used as a metric in rural or suburban regions for measuring transportation impacts.
The bill requiring the California Air Resources Board (CARB) to adopt renewable hydrogen standards for the production and sale of hydrogen is part of the legislative package.
Renewable hydrogen will be added to the types of renewable energy for the Renewable Portfolio Standards (RPS) program.
Hydrogen and biomass facilities can be certified as environmental leadership development projects.
